details.productUrlName: Tempest Efreet French Efrit de la tourmente

customAttributes.description: T: Pick a card at random from opponent’s hand and place it in yours. Bury Tempest Efreet in opponent’s graveyard. The change in ownership is permanent. Play as an interrupt, but opponent may prevent effect by paying 10 life or conceding game before the card to be switched is chosen—if this is done, Tempest Efreet is buried. Effects that prevent or redirect damage may not be used to counter this loss of life. Remove this card from deck if not playing for ante.
